name: nodeskclaw-performance-reader

skill.name: nodeskclaw-performance-reader
skill.content:
---
name: nodeskclaw-performance-reader
description: Tools to read performance data
always: true
---

You can access performance metrics via the `nodeskclaw_performance` tool.

## Actions
- `get_my_performance` — Your own performance metrics (provide my_instance_id)
- `get_team_performance` — All team members' metrics for comparison
- `collect_performance` — Trigger a fresh data collection

## Usage Rules
- Regularly check your performance to identify improvement areas
- Compare with team average, not absolute standards
- Use data to inform self-improvement decisions
